candidates.why: Explicit total top-line revenue label; identical values to Net revenue and appropriate as a revenue fallback.
Not revenue; this is cost of sales.
Direct top-line revenue label and likely primary operating sales line.

variables.notes: Using revenue labels as priority list; later code can take first non-missing value by year.

candidates.why: Looks like direct project delivery cost and matches Cost of Revenues/COGS numerically in reported years.
Explicit standardized COGS label; best direct match for cost of sales.

variables.notes: Preferred explicit COGS row over component-like duplicate External project costs.

candidates.why: Could be overhead, but preview is empty and capitalization differs from populated row 'Other external costs'.
Appears to be direct project/service delivery cost and matches COGS; should be excluded from SG&A.
Likely overhead bucket within operating expenses; populated and distinct from COGS.
Share-based compensation is a valid SG&A component when reported separately.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. Candidate list misses the major overhead row 'Staff expenses and remuneration', which is a strong SG&A component. Selected it from the full A-column preview together with populated overhead rows 'Other external costs' and 'Share-based payment'. Excluded 'External project costs' because it is COGS/direct project cost. Manual review needed because selection goes outside candidate list. | Escape-hatch used (final_choice outside candidate list): [Income Statement] Staff expenses and remuneration

candidates.why: Balance sheet asset, not an income statement R&D expense line.
Amortization of capitalized development assets, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset, not income statement R&D expense.
Capitalized development asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Development Projects Finalized Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Accumulated amortization/impairment balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.
Gross capitalized development asset, not R&D expense.
Gross capitalized balance sheet amount, not an expense line.
Amortization of capitalized development costs, not current R&D expense.
Balance sheet gross asset value, not R&D expense.
Net balance sheet asset value, not R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated income statement R&D expense line is present. Balance sheet development-cost rows are capitalized assets/amortization, not current-period R&D expense.

candidates.why: Comprehensive finance-cost line; usable fallback if no dedicated interest-expense line is available.
Dedicated interest expense line but appears to cover only bank-loan interest, not necessarily total interest expense.
Not specifically interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Dedicated interest expense line but only for lease liabilities, so likely partial.
Most semantically correct aggregate interest-expense label if populated in some years, even though preview is blank.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Supplemental and partial interest component; lower preference.

variables.notes: Using a priority list rather than separate components to avoid partial-interest undercounting. Prefer explicit aggregate 'Interest Expenses'; fallback to 'Financial expenses' if the aggregate line is missing.

candidates.why: Not book equity; unrelated income statement line.
Best available equity line, but there are two identical 'Equity' rows in the preview with different values in 2020, implying one may exclude NCI and the other may include it.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing row, not equity.
Total balance sheet, not equity.

variables.notes: REVIEWED. There are two separate balance-sheet rows both labeled exactly 'Equity' with different values in 2020. Because exact-label mapping cannot distinguish which one excludes non-controlling interests, manual review is needed to ensure BE excludes MIB and avoid double counting with minority interest.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not balance sheet minority equity.
Income statement allocation line, not preferred for balance sheet MIB.
Explicit balance sheet non-controlling interest line; preferred exact match.
Duplicate balance sheet NCI label variant; suitable fallback.

candidates.row_label: Minority interests Total comprehensive income Operating profit (EBIT)
candidates.why: Malformed income statement line, not balance sheet minority interest.

variables.notes: Using balance sheet NCI labels as priority list; later code can take the first non-missing value by year.
